mapper.select:
SELECT w.wo_code, w.lot_no, w.ord_code, w.corp_name, w.prod_name, w.prod_no, w.prod_gyu, w.prod_jai, w.ord_su, w.ord_lot, w.bcf_hogi, w.tf_hogi, w.bcf_cycle_no, w.tf_cycle_no, w.main_auto_pattern_number, w.main_yn, w.main_bcf_pattern_number, w.main_tf_pattern_number, w.main_bcf_hogi, w.main_tf_hogi, w.main_spare_1, w.main_spare_2, w.main_spare_3, w.main_spare_4, w.main_bigo_1, w.main_bigo_2, w.main_bigo_3, w.main_bigo_4, w.main_bigo_5, w.status, w.reg_user, w.pdf_path, DATE_FORMAT(w.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_date, IFNULL(i.ord_su, 0) AS ipgo_su, IFNULL( (SELECT SUM(och_su) FROM tb_chulgo c WHERE c.ord_code = w.ord_code) , 0) AS chulgo_su, IFNULL(i.ord_su, 0) - IFNULL( (SELECT SUM(och_su) FROM tb_chulgo c WHERE c.ord_code = w.ord_code) , 0) AS jan_su FROM tb_work_order w LEFT JOIN tb_ipgo i ON i.ord_code = w.ord_code WHERE 1=1
AND DATE(w.reg_date) >= #{sdate}
AND DATE(w.reg_date) <= #{edate}
AND w.lot_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lot_no}, '%')
AND w.prod_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{prod_name}, '%')
AND w.corp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{corp_name}, '%')
ORDER BY w.wo_code DESC
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(lot_no), '') FROM tb_work_order WHERE lot_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_work_order ( lot_no, ord_code, corp_name, prod_name, prod_no, prod_gyu, prod_jai, ord_su, ord_lot, auto_pattern, bcf_cycle_no, tf_cycle_no, bcf_hogi, tf_hogi, bcf_time_fanup, bcf_time_spare1, bcf_time_spare2, bcf_time_chim, bcf_time_diff, bcf_time_gang, bcf_time_spare3, bcf_time_que, bcf_time_drain, bcf_temp_fanup, bcf_temp_spare1, bcf_temp_spare2, bcf_temp_chim, bcf_temp_diff, bcf_temp_gang, bcf_temp_spare3, bcf_temp_que, bcf_temp_drain, bcf_cp_fanup, bcf_cp_spare1, bcf_cp_spare2, bcf_cp_chim, bcf_cp_diff, bcf_cp_gang, tf_time_spare1, tf_time_spare2, tf_time_spare3, tf_time_spare4, tf_time_dry, tf_time_fanup, tf_time_n2, tf_time_tem, tf_time_cool, tf_temp_spare1, tf_temp_spare2, tf_temp_spare3, tf_temp_spare4, tf_temp_dry, tf_temp_fanup, tf_temp_n2, tf_temp_tem, tf_temp_cool, main_auto_pattern_number, main_yn, main_bcf_pattern_number, main_tf_pattern_number, main_bcf_hogi, main_tf_hogi, main_spare_1, main_spare_2, main_spare_3, main_spare_4, main_bigo_1, main_bigo_2, main_bigo_3, main_bigo_4, main_bigo_5, status, reg_date, reg_user ) VALUES ( #{lot_no}, #{ord_code}, #{corp_name}, #{prod_name}, #{prod_no}, #{prod_gyu}, #{prod_jai}, #{ord_su}, #{ord_lot}, #{auto_pattern}, #{bcf_cycle_no}, #{tf_cycle_no}, #{bcf_hogi}, #{tf_hogi}, #{bcf_time_fanup}, #{bcf_time_spare1}, #{bcf_time_spare2}, #{bcf_time_chim}, #{bcf_time_diff}, #{bcf_time_gang}, #{bcf_time_spare3}, #{bcf_time_que}, #{bcf_time_drain}, #{bcf_temp_fanup}, #{bcf_temp_spare1}, #{bcf_temp_spare2}, #{bcf_temp_chim}, #{bcf_temp_diff}, #{bcf_temp_gang}, #{bcf_temp_spare3}, #{bcf_temp_que}, #{bcf_temp_drain}, #{bcf_cp_fanup}, #{bcf_cp_spare1}, #{bcf_cp_spare2}, #{bcf_cp_chim}, #{bcf_cp_diff}, #{bcf_cp_gang}, #{tf_time_spare1}, #{tf_time_spare2}, #{tf_time_spare3}, #{tf_time_spare4}, #{tf_time_dry}, #{tf_time_fanup}, #{tf_time_n2}, #{tf_time_tem}, #{tf_time_cool}, #{tf_temp_spare1}, #{tf_temp_spare2}, #{tf_temp_spare3}, #{tf_temp_spare4}, #{tf_temp_dry}, #{tf_temp_fanup}, #{tf_temp_n2}, #{tf_temp_tem}, #{tf_temp_cool}, #{main_auto_pattern_number}, #{main_yn}, #{main_bcf_pattern_number}, #{main_tf_pattern_number}, #{main_bcf_hogi}, #{main_tf_hogi}, #{main_spare_1}, #{main_spare_2}, #{main_spare_3}, #{main_spare_4}, #{main_bigo_1}, #{main_bigo_2}, #{main_bigo_3}, #{main_bigo_4}, #{main_bigo_5}, 'WAIT', NOW(), #{reg_user} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_work_order SET ord_code = #{ord_code}, corp_name = #{corp_name}, prod_name = #{prod_name}, prod_no = #{prod_no}, prod_gyu = #{prod_gyu}, prod_jai = #{prod_jai}, ord_su = #{ord_su}, ord_lot = #{ord_lot}, auto_pattern = #{auto_pattern}, bcf_cycle_no = #{bcf_cycle_no}, tf_cycle_no = #{tf_cycle_no}, bcf_hogi = #{bcf_hogi}, tf_hogi = #{tf_hogi}, bcf_time_fanup = #{bcf_time_fanup}, bcf_time_spare1 = #{bcf_time_spare1}, bcf_time_spare2 = #{bcf_time_spare2}, bcf_time_chim = #{bcf_time_chim}, bcf_time_diff = #{bcf_time_diff}, bcf_time_gang = #{bcf_time_gang}, bcf_time_spare3 = #{bcf_time_spare3}, bcf_time_que = #{bcf_time_que}, bcf_time_drain = #{bcf_time_drain}, bcf_temp_fanup = #{bcf_temp_fanup}, bcf_temp_spare1 = #{bcf_temp_spare1}, bcf_temp_spare2 = #{bcf_temp_spare2}, bcf_temp_chim = #{bcf_temp_chim}, bcf_temp_diff = #{bcf_temp_diff}, bcf_temp_gang = #{bcf_temp_gang}, bcf_temp_spare3 = #{bcf_temp_spare3}, bcf_temp_que = #{bcf_temp_que}, bcf_temp_drain = #{bcf_temp_drain}, bcf_cp_fanup = #{bcf_cp_fanup}, bcf_cp_spare1 = #{bcf_cp_spare1}, bcf_cp_spare2 = #{bcf_cp_spare2}, bcf_cp_chim = #{bcf_cp_chim}, bcf_cp_diff = #{bcf_cp_diff}, bcf_cp_gang = #{bcf_cp_gang}, tf_time_spare1 = #{tf_time_spare1}, tf_time_spare2 = #{tf_time_spare2}, tf_time_spare3 = #{tf_time_spare3}, tf_time_spare4 = #{tf_time_spare4}, tf_time_dry = #{tf_time_dry}, tf_time_fanup = #{tf_time_fanup}, tf_time_n2 = #{tf_time_n2}, tf_time_tem = #{tf_time_tem}, tf_time_cool = #{tf_time_cool}, tf_temp_spare1 = #{tf_temp_spare1}, tf_temp_spare2 = #{tf_temp_spare2}, tf_temp_spare3 = #{tf_temp_spare3}, tf_temp_spare4 = #{tf_temp_spare4}, tf_temp_dry = #{tf_temp_dry}, tf_temp_fanup = #{tf_temp_fanup}, tf_temp_n2 = #{tf_temp_n2}, tf_temp_tem = #{tf_temp_tem}, tf_temp_cool = #{tf_temp_cool}, main_auto_pattern_number = #{main_auto_pattern_number}, main_yn = #{main_yn}, main_bcf_pattern_number = #{main_bcf_pattern_number}, main_tf_pattern_number = #{main_tf_pattern_number}, main_bcf_hogi = #{main_bcf_hogi}, main_tf_hogi = #{main_tf_hogi}, main_spare_1 = #{main_spare_1}, main_spare_2 = #{main_spare_2}, main_spare_3 = #{main_spare_3}, main_spare_4 = #{main_spare_4}, main_bigo_1 = #{main_bigo_1}, main_bigo_2 = #{main_bigo_2}, main_bigo_3 = #{main_bigo_3}, main_bigo_4 = #{main_bigo_4}, main_bigo_5 = #{main_bigo_5}, reg_user = #{reg_user} WHERE wo_code = #{wo_code}
UPDATE tb_work_order SET pdf_path = #{pdf_path} WHERE wo_code = #{wo_code}
